meaning: n.拇指甲,极小的东西adj.极小的,极短的
examples: I used my thumbnail to tighten the screw on my lamp.
That is a very thumbnail sketch of the Judeo-Christian story.
For this miniscule chameleon is so small that it can sit on a human thumbnail with room to spare.
Most of these thumbnail memories were written as dispatches for the then-Manchester Guardian and the BBC.
Thumbnail images representing albums appear side-by-side and fill the phone's screen in a checkerboard fashion.
